name: Bread Stuffing (for Poultry)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the bread in cold water and squeeze dry.
2. Add the seasoning ingredients and melted butter to the bread and mix thoroughly.
3. Add the egg and the heart, liver, and gizzard of the fowl which have been partially cooked and chopped fine.
4. Use this stuffing for poultry.
